Mặc dù một số người cho rằng Internet tạo ra nhiều cơ hội mới cho giao tiếp toàn cầu, những người khác lại lo lắng về tác động tiêu cực của nó đối với đời sống xã hội của chúng ta. Theo ý kiến của tôi, Internet có cả tác động tích cực và tiêu cực đến các mối quan hệ của con người. Về mặt tích cực, Internet giúp mọi người giữ liên lạc một cách dễ dàng, bất kể họ ở đâu. Trong quá khứ, việc liên lạc với bạn bè hay người thân sống ở nước ngoài là rất khó khăn. Ngày nay, nhờ vào các ứng dụng mạng xã hội như Facebook, WhatsApp hay Skype, chúng ta có thể nói chuyện và nhìn thấy mặt họ bất cứ lúc nào một cách miễn phí. Sự tiện lợi này giúp mọi người chia sẻ cuộc sống hàng ngày và xây dựng những tình bạn quốc tế mới. Thế giới dường như nhỏ bé hơn, và con người cảm thấy gần gũi với nhau hơn. Tuy nhiên, Internet cũng mang lại một số ảnh hưởng tiêu cực đến các cuộc gặp gỡ hội thoại trực tiếp. Bởi vì rất nhiều người dành quá nhiều thời gian vào việc dùng điện thoại thông minh và máy tính, họ có ít thời gian hơn để giao tiếp với những người thực sự ở xung quanh mình. Chẳng hạn, rất dễ để bắt gặp hình ảnh một nhóm bạn ngồi trong quán cà phê nhưng lại chúi mũi vào điện thoại thay vì nói chuyện với nhau. Thói quen này có thể làm cho mọi người cảm thấy cô đơn và bị cô lập trong đời thực. Thêm vào đó, khi mọi người nói chuyện trên mạng, họ không thể nhìn thấy ngôn ngữ cơ thể hay lắng nghe âm điệu giọng nói, điều mà đôi khi có thể dẫn đến những sự hiểu lầm. Tóm lại, Internet mang lại vô số lợi ích trong việc kết nối mọi người trên phạm vi toàn cầu, nhưng nó cũng sinh ra khoảng cách giữa con người với con người ở ngoài đời thực. Tôi tin rằng chúng ta nên sử dụng Internet một cách khôn ngoan và dành nhiều thời gian chất lượng hơn để gặp gỡ trực tiếp gia đình và bạn bè.

writing/task2/10.html.title: 🔖 Đề 10
writing/task2/10.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about the quality of life in large cities. Recent years have witnessed the increasingly deteriorating quality of cities. This phenomenon is largely attributed to population explosion and pollution. Therefore, effective solutions must be proposed to tackle this issue. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing the causes and potential solutions to this problem. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/16.html.title: 🔖 Đề 16
writing/task2/16.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about vegetarianism. Vegetarians tend to avoid consuming meat and fish for the purpose of maintaining good health and due to environmental concerns. It is a fact that several groups of people prefer not to consume any kind of meat or fish, as they believe that being vegetarian brings many benefits for their health and for the world as a whole. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing your opinions on this viewpoint. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/20.html.title: 🔖 Đề 20
writing/task2/20.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about the ways to develop skills for children. Child development is widely accepted as a significant responsibility for parents. It is believed that allowing young children to practice their hobbies or participate in sports is more beneficial for their development than focusing solely on reading books or novels. In other words, engaging in enjoyable activities with children can enhance their skills and creativity more effectively than reading. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing your opinions on this viewpoint. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/22.html.title: 🔖 Đề 22
writing/task2/22.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about the admission fee of museums. A museum is an entity that preserves the artifacts of history and works as an important representative of a nation's tradition and culture. Thus, the importance of museums in conveying historical facts to the new generation is beyond controversy. However, the question of whether museums should charge an admission fee remains open to debate. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing whether the advantages of charging an admission fee to museums outweigh the disadvantages. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/24.html.title: 🔖 Đề 24
writing/task2/24.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about the fresh water issue. Fresh water has long been a scarce resource in certain regions. However, due to increasing global demand, it has now become a pressing worldwide issue. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing the causes of rising demand for fresh water and suggesting measures that governments and individuals can take to address this issue. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/26.html.title: 🔖 Đề 26
writing/task2/26.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about work-life balance. One of the most significant challenges in the 21st century is maintaining a proper work-life balance. Many people struggle to manage their time effectively, striving to succeed at work while also spending quality time with their families. This issue has become increasingly common in modern society. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing the causes of this issue and suggesting solutions that individuals and employers can implement to address the problem. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/28.html.title: 🔖 Đề 28
writing/task2/28.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about sports at school. Sports have traditionally been a form of leisure, with a wide variety of games enjoyed across the world. However, in modern times, the role of sports in education has become a topic of debate. Some people believe that sports should be an essential part of school life for children, while others argue that it should be purely optional. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing both perspectives on whether sports should be a mandatory part of school life or an optional activity. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/30.html.title: 🔖 Đề 30
writing/task2/30.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about zoos. Living beings are an inseparable part of the natural world, and the treatment of animals remains a controversial issue. Some people feel that keeping animals in captivity, such as in zoos, is always wrong. Others argue that keeping animals in zoos benefits both animals and humans. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing both perspectives on keeping animals in zoos. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/32.html.title: 🔖 Đề 32
writing/task2/32.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about choices of university students. Some people argue that university students should have the freedom to choose any subject they are passionate about. Others believe that students should be restricted to studying fields that are considered beneficial for the future, such as science and technology. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/34.html.title: 🔖 Đề 34
writing/task2/34.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text from an article about ex-prisoners. It is undeniable that ex-prisoners can reintegrate into society and become responsible, productive citizens. Some former prisoners successfully turn their lives around and contribute positively to society. Many argue that they are the most effective individuals to educate teenagers about the consequences of crime. Write an essay for an educated audience discussing your opinion on whether ex-prisoners are the best people to educate teenagers about crime. Support your answer with specific reasons and relevant examples. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/57.html.title: 🔖 Đề 57

writing/task2/58.html.title: 🔖 Đề 58

writing/task2/60.html.title: 🔖 Đề 60

writing/task2/63.html.title: 🔖 Đề 63

writing/task2/66.html.title: 🔖 Đề 66
writing/task2/66.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Write about the following topic. Write an essay to an educated reader explaining which point of view you agree with. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/67.html.title: 🔖 Đề 67
writing/task2/67.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Write about the following topic. In the 21st century, more and more females are career women. They spend more time at work than at home. Most of them earn enough to have a housemaid and to eat out. Some people believe that children, especially girls, do not need to learn how to cook or do household chores. Write an essay to an educated reader discussing your opinion. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task2/68.html.title: 🔖 Đề 68
writing/task2/68.html.body: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task. Read the following text about the problem of overweight children. The number of children who are considered overweight is increasing. This is a negative consequence of modern life habits such as eating fast food or playing video games. Therefore, some people think increasing the time spent on physical education at school is the best way to deal with the problem of overweight children. Write an essay to an educated reader discussing whether you agree or disagree with the statement and give your own opinion. Include specific reasons and any relevant examples to support your answer. Give reasons and relevant examples from your knowledge or experience. You should write at least 250 words. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.
